cards.prompt: var a = ImmutableList.Create(1,2,3); var b = a.Add(4); печать a.Count, b.Count, ReferenceEquals(a,b)?
cards.code: using System.Reflection; var asm = Assembly.Load("System.Collections.Immutable"); var stat = asm.GetType("System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableList"); MethodInfo createG = null; foreach (var m in stat.GetMethods()) { if (m.Name == "Create" && m.IsGenericMethodDefinition) { var ps = m.GetParameters(); if (ps.Length == 1 && ps[0].ParameterType.IsArray) { createG = m; break; } } } var create = createG.MakeGenericMethod(typeof(int)); object a = create.Invoke(null, new object[] { new int[] { 1, 2, 3 } }); object b = a.GetType().GetMethod("Add").Invoke(a, new object[] { 4 }); var cp = a.GetType().GetProperty("Count"); System.Console.WriteLine($"a.Count={(int)cp.GetValue(a)} b.Count={(int)cp.GetValue(b)} same={object.ReferenceEquals(a, b)}");

cards.prompt: var arr = ImmutableArray.Create(10,20,30); var arr2 = arr.Add(40); печать arr.Length, arr2.Length, arr[1]?
cards.code: using System.Reflection; var asm = Assembly.Load("System.Collections.Immutable"); var stat = asm.GetType("System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray"); MethodInfo createG = null; foreach (var m in stat.GetMethods()) { if (m.Name == "Create" && m.IsGenericMethodDefinition) { var ps = m.GetParameters(); if (ps.Length == 1 && ps[0].ParameterType.IsArray) { createG = m; break; } } } var create = createG.MakeGenericMethod(typeof(int)); object arr = create.Invoke(null, new object[] { new int[] { 10, 20, 30 } }); object arr2 = arr.GetType().GetMethod("Add").Invoke(arr, new object[] { 40 }); var lenP = arr.GetType().GetProperty("Length"); var itemP = arr.GetType().GetProperty("Item"); int one = (int)itemP.GetValue(arr, new object[] { 1 }); System.Console.WriteLine($"arr={(int)lenP.GetValue(arr)} arr2={(int)lenP.GetValue(arr2)} arr[1]={one}");

cards.prompt: Builder: CreateBuilder<int>(), Add(i*i) для i=0..4, ToImmutable(); печать builder.Count и result?
cards.code: using System.Reflection; var asm = Assembly.Load("System.Collections.Immutable"); var stat = asm.GetType("System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableList"); MethodInfo cbG = null; foreach (var m in stat.GetMethods()) { if (m.Name == "CreateBuilder" && m.IsGenericMethodDefinition && m.GetParameters().Length == 0) { cbG = m; break; } } object builder = cbG.MakeGenericMethod(typeof(int)).Invoke(null, null); var addM = builder.GetType().GetMethod("Add"); for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) addM.Invoke(builder, new object[] { i * i }); object result = builder.GetType().GetMethod("ToImmutable").Invoke(builder, null); var bcP = builder.GetType().GetProperty("Count"); var rcP = result.GetType().GetProperty("Count"); var itemP = result.GetType().GetProperty("Item"); var parts = new string[(int)rcP.GetValue(result)]; for (int i = 0; i < parts.Length; i++) parts[i] = itemP.GetValue(result, new object[] { i }).ToString(); System.Console.WriteLine($"builder.Count={(int)bcP.GetValue(builder)} result=[{string.Join(",", parts)}]");
